text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, my Bakushin energy is particularly strong
on my days off. I accidentally ran to the border of
the prefecture...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Right on schedule, my rival!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A bullet train! As expected! What performance!
Running at such speeds!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...But I won't lose! I'll show you the fruits of my
training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... No way. How could I... lose sight of it...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Where... where did I end up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time Sakura Bakushin O makes it back to
Tracen Academy, she's completely exhausted.
